phase-0.notes: Modelo mental do repositorio — Phase 0 do analyze-and-improve. 145+ linhas MD + 320 linhas YAML com file:line references. Cobre goals, arquitetura (10 abstracoes, 5 relationships), patterns (20 canonical docs), terminologia (17 termos), curriculo (4 niveis, 8 conceitos) e gaps (11 gaps documentados).

phase-1.notes: Extracao de conhecimento — Phase 1. 211+ linhas MD + 338 linhas YAML. 5 frameworks, 7 patterns, 6 operational lessons, 7 tradeoffs, 7 failure patterns, synthesis com 5 insights emergentes.

phase-2.notes: Extracao de padroes reutilizaveis — Phase 2. 16 padroes com 6 campos obrigatorios cada + components + flow. 405+ linhas MD + 547 linhas YAML.

phase-3.notes: Classificacao — Phase 3. 446 linhas MD + 445 linhas YAML. 4 Better Implementation, 3 Already Exists, 7 Partial Coverage, 2 Missing.

phase-4.notes: Geracao de artefatos e roadmap — Phase 4. 4 canonical docs + 2 skills + 2 exercises + integration roadmap.

phase-5.notes: Integracao — Phase 5. system-of-record updated com 4 canonical docs + analise. curriculum/README.md e MASTER_PLAN.md atualizados. last_updated: 2026-06-11.

phase-6.notes: Curriculum Deep Integration — Phase 6. 5 curriculum files modified (GLOSSARY.md, harness-evolution.md, harness-design-checklist.md, harness-evolution-playbook.md, rubric-design.md). 4 padroes integrados (2 Missing + 2 Partial Coverage High).
